content.speakerText: Is the Old Town far from here? Can I walk?
content.speakerTextCn: 老城区离这儿远吗？能走过去吗？
expectedAnswers: It's only a 15-minute walk — very close!
You can definitely walk. It's just a short stroll through the streets.
No need to walk — take bus 12, it’s faster and you’ll get there in 8 minutes.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确回答了步行是否可行
语言准确性：使用了正确的时态、单位和表达（如 on foot / stroll / take bus）
表达自然度：使用了口语化表达（super close / just a short stroll）
关键词覆盖：包含 distance / walk / bus 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: What about the mountain view spot? Is it worth the trip?
content.speakerTextCn: 那个观山景点值得专程去吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, absolutely — the sunset view is unforgettable, even though it takes 30 minutes by bus.
If you have time and love views, yes. Otherwise, you can skip it without missing much.
It's worth it if you're into photography — best light at golden hour.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰评估了景点的性价比（值得/不值得）
语言准确性：正确使用了条件句（if you have time）、比较级（best light）等结构
表达自然度：语气自然，有推荐性而非命令式，符合口语习惯
关键词覆盖：包含 worth the trip / view / bus / time 等核心词汇

content.speakerText: I’m interested in the local market. Is it easy to get to? And is it worth visiting?
content.speakerTextCn: 我对当地市场感兴趣。好去吗？值得去吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, it’s just a 10-minute walk from here — and totally worth it for fresh food and souvenirs!
You can take the tram to Central Square, it’s right there. It’s busy but authentic — great for photos and snacks.
It’s a bit far — about 20 minutes by bus — but if you like local culture, it’s one of the best spots in town.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：同时回应了交通便利性与推荐价值两个问题
语言准确性：正确使用了表达距离（10-minute walk / 20 minutes by bus）和推荐结构（worth it / one of the best）
表达自然度：语气热情、有建议性，符合旅游咨询语境
关键词覆盖：包含 market / get to / worth visiting / bus / walk 等场景关键词
